label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 19

extraction.one_line_summary: DAINESE Alberto won the Stage 19 sprint from GANNA Filippo by 3/4 bike length after a late crash eliminated GROVES Kaden's leadout train.
tactical_patterns: GROVES survived late crash but lacked leadout support, proving sprint organization collapses faster than raw legs in chaos finishes.
DAINESE won without leadout train against full EF organization for VAN DEN BERG, showing late positioning trumps team structure.
Intermediate sprint at 2.3km allowed GC riders to skip contestation, revealing EVENEPOEL abandoned green jersey fight despite proximity.
Right-hand turn 2.3km out created crash chaos, suggesting technical corners inside 3km concentrate peloton dangerously despite wide roads.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: neutral: escaped crash injury and won intermediate sprint for green jersey buffer, but lost team support in finale
rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: capitalized on organizational chaos to win without leadout, leaving team DSM despite late-race breakthrough form
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: nearly won mass sprint as non-sprinter through pure power, suggesting underutilized sprint potential in chaos scenarios
rider_signals.VAN DEN BERG Marijn: negative: had full EF leadout but lost from ideal position, exposing execution weakness despite tactical advantage
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: skipped intermediate sprint despite green jersey competition, confirming GC protection overrides secondary objectives pre-TT
